name: channel-alf-planner
description: Plan Channel Talk ALF setup from FAQ, policy, support notes, and anonymized inquiry samples.

interface.shortDescription: Turn support notes into a Channel Talk ALF setup plan.
interface.longDescription: Helps e-commerce CX leads convert pasted FAQ, policy, support notes, and optional anonymized inquiries into inquiry taxonomy, FAQ gaps, ALF Rule candidates, ALF Task candidates, answer-quality risks, escalation triggers, and next setup actions.
defaultPrompt: Plan ALF setup from these support notes.
Find FAQ gaps and ALF rule candidates.
Turn these inquiries into a Channel Talk plan.
